description_for_human: Satyajit Ghana's AI-native personal site — projects, writing, daily arXiv digests, resume, patents.
description_for_model: Query Satyajit Ghana's personal site. Read /llms.txt for the index, append .md to any page URL for markdown, use the JSON API described in /openapi.json, or connect to the MCP endpoint at /api/mcp/mcp (Streamable HTTP, read-only tools incl. ask_satyajit).
